case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ANTHONY BOYKO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100038021) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BOYKO, ANTHONY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-06-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-06-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-14-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-20-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 63073483)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
